finalized_plan.description: Use the web_search tool to locate the LibreText Introductory Chemistry materials compiled on 08/21/2023, ensuring that the search keywords include “LibreText Introductory Chemistry”, “08/21/2023”, “CK-12 license”, and the names “Marisa Alviar-Agnew & Henry Agnew.”
Identify the correct material's URL and then use the visit_page tool to access the webpage containing the materials
Locate the table of contents or navigation structure on the page, and focus on identifying the “1.E Exercises” section
Use the find_on_page_ctrl_f tool to search for the text “1.E Exercises” on the page to jump directly to that section
Within the “1.E Exercises” section, further search for keywords such as “veterinarian” or “equine” to find the specific reference that mentions the equine veterinarian
Extract the relevant excerpt from the exercises that includes the full text mentioning the equine veterinarian, ensuring the full name is clearly captured
Parse the extracted excerpt to isolate and extract the full name of the equine veterinarian
Process the full name to extract only the surname (typically the last component of the name)

Compose a final answer that includes: 
   - A short version of the task outcome.
   - An extremely detailed version explaining the context and extraction process.
   - Any additional relevant context or information that supports the findings

notes: The agent ultimately completed the task successfully
